# Raidy Alejandro - JavaScript Fullstack Developer

## About
Raidy Alejandro Arenas Ortiz is a JavaScript Fullstack Developer with 5+ years of experience building digital products end-to-end in the JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystem. Computer Engineer from UNET (Venezuela). Based in Venezuela and Colombia, available for remote work worldwide.

## Skills
- Frontend: Angular, Ionic, Capacitor, TailwindCSS
- Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, Middlewares
- Real-time: Socket.io
- Database: MySQL, PostgreSQL
- Architecture: Event Bus, Message Queues
- Cloud: AWS (EC2, Load Balancers)
- Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript
- Payments: Stripe, PayPal integration

## Experience

### Reservándonos (June 2021 - Present)
Fullstack Developer | Mexico · Remote
Restaurant reservation platform. Responsible for the complete technological ecosystem:
- 2 mobile apps published on Google Play Store and Apple App Store
- Admin panel built with Angular
- REST API with Express.js and custom middlewares
- Event-driven architecture with queues and event bus
- MySQL database design and management
- AWS EC2 instances and application load balancers
- Stripe and PayPal payment integration

### PHLOX Networks (Jan - Aug 2020)
Full Stack Developer · Freelance | Argentina · Remote
Corporate chat system development:
- Integration of WhatsApp, SMS, and Facebook Messenger into enterprise chat
- Real-time features with Socket.io
- Express.js and Angular.js stack

### SIFAC S.A. (Apr - Jul 2019)
Frontend Developer · Freelance | Ecuador · Remote
Desktop to web migration project:
- Migration of desktop system interfaces to modern web application
- Angular 7 with Material Design
- Responsive UI implementation

## Education
### Computer Engineering (Ingeniería Informática)
UNET - Universidad Nacional Experimental del Táchira
Venezuela, 2008

## Certifications & Courses
- MEAN Stack Web Development
- Node.js: Async Programming, REST API with Dependency Injection
- Docker, Compose & Swarm
- ReactiveX - RxJs

## Projects

### Reservándonos Partners
Mobile app for restaurant partners. Reservation management, tables, and real-time customer handling.
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.reservandonos.partner
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/ve/app/reserv%C3%A1ndonos-partners/id1618279461

### Gestión de Mesas Reservándonos
Maps and management app for the Reservándonos system. Restaurant visualization and availability.
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.reservandonos.map
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/ve/app/gesti%C3%B3n-de-mesas-reserv%C3%A1ndonos/id6450544829
